The '''''Scarlet Thranta''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Judicial Forces/Legends|Judicial Forces]].

==History==
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], it was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Zozridor Slayke]] and had a crew of 150.

Shortly before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the ''Scarlet Thranta'' was assigned to patrol the [[Sluis sector/Legends|Sluis sector]], near the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] space. Angered by the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate's]] unwillingness to act, Slayke went rogue, and the ''Scarlet Thranta'' entered the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] with intentions of waging a private war against the Confederacy.

Although no battles were reported before the start of the Clone Wars, a 45,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty was placed on his head by the leaders of [[Sluis Van/Legends|Sluis Van]], and a [[Judicial Department/Legends|Judicial Department]] task force under [[Nejaa Halcyon]] was [[Mission to Bpfassh (Separatist Crisis)|dispatched]] to recapture the vessel. Slayke took the ''Thranta'' to [[Bpfassh]] and disabled it. While Halcyon and his men were attempting to capture Slayke, he and his crew stole Halcyon's ''[[Plooriod Bodkin]]'' and fled, leaving their would-be captors stranded on Bpfassh.

Captain Slayke's ship was named for the flying [[Thranta/Legends|thranta]].
